verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When you lift your hands up high And you sing a song of praise to me It brings me great delight Such a lovely sight And yes it is true Praise looks good on you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Morning night and noon Your praise ascends to heaven like The smell of sweet perfume Filling every room And yes it is true Praise looks good on you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You bring your sacrifices And you offer up your praise You lift your voice with singing But your heart seems far away More than a sacrifice I am looking for your life Holy and acceptable And pleasing in my sight

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So offer up your lives Holy and acceptable A willing sacrifice Precious in my sight But in all that you do Remember all I want is you

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So lift your hands up high And worship him before the altar Consecrate your life A willing sacrifice But in all that you do Remember all he wants is you

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And yes it is true Praise looks good on you
